keyPoints: 802.15.4g focuses on improving performance and capacity of 802.15.4 devices
IEEE 802.15.4e updates the standard to support mesh networking and other new features
IEEE 1901.2a enables high-speed data transfer in utility networks
IEEE 802.11ah uses the 802.11ac standard for low-power, low-bandwidth IoT devices
LoRaWAN offers a long-range, low-power wireless communication technology
NB-IoT provides a cellular-based IoT solution with low power consumption and wide coverage
